subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the first ruler of Mewar?
question_hi: मेवार के पहले समाजानेवाला कौन था?
explanation_en: Rana Pratap was the first ruler of Mewar. He was a brave warrior and a prominent figure in Rajasthani history.
explanation_hi: रानेश प्रतप मेवार के पहले समाजानेवाला था। वो राजनी कलेश प्रतप के बाबती नहीं होते हैं। वो राजनी के बाबती थे।
explanation_en: Rana Pratap was the first ruler of Mewar. He was a brave warrior and a prominent figure in Rajasthani history.
explanation_hi: रानी के बाबती हीं थे। वो राजनी के बाबती थे।
explanation_en: Rana Pratap was the first ruler of Mewar. He was a valiant warrior and an influential figure in Rajasthani history.
explanation_hi: रानी के बाबती थे। वो राजनी के बाबती थे।
explanation_en: Rana Pratap was the first ruler of Mewar. He was a courageous warrior and a significant figure in Rajasthani history.
explanation_hi: रानी के बाबती थे। वो राजनी के बाबती थे।
